passiveAbilities.name: Great Sword
passiveAbilities.description: : If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +3. If this character deals Impact or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Stand Back!
activeAbilities.description: All other models within the pulse move 1” directly away.

activeAbilities.name: Intimidate
activeAbilities.description: Target Human or Goblin suffers -2 Arcane stat and gains [Predictable Combatant: During a round of combat, before each player selects their combat card, you must reveal your hand to your opponent.] until end of the turn.

signatureMove.name: Corn Cutter
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Deal 2 Slicing Dmg to all models within 2” that did not participate in this round of melee. This does not count as Melee Dmg.
